sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96547" key="stereoba/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στερεο-βάτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n96547.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">foundation course of a building</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.4.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
